summary: Backend: 16/16 pytest passing (auth, properties, contracts CRUD/sign/status, KPIs, RBAC admin vs inquilino). Frontend: login renders Spanish UI w/ navy+gold theme, Google button, demo accounts info. Cookie-injected admin session loads /dashboard with 'Bienvenido, Admin.' greeting, all 4 KPI cards (Ingresos $166,000, Ocupacion 83%, Contratos por Vencer 3, Tasa de Morosidad 20%) + upcoming list. Rent Roll shows 5 contracts with colored status badges (Pagado=green, Pendiente=gold, Atrasado=red), Rentas Cobradas $67,000 auto-sum, search+filter present. Contratos page shows 5 cards w/ Firmado indicator and Abrir buttons. Propiedades grid shows 6 properties w/ images. Sidebar nav works. Unauthenticated /dashboard properly redirects to login.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py role assignment hardcodes admin for non-tenant emails, fine for demo but real prod needs explicit role mgmt
ensure_demo_data() called on every list endpoint - acceptable since gated by count check but adds 1 query per request
/api/auth/session sets secure samesite=none cookie which is correct for cross-origin
test_credentials: Mongo-injected sessions: admin token=admintok_1777390626809 (admin.test@revant.mx, role=admin); tenant token=tentok_1777390626869 (jorge.tenant@revant.mx, role=inquilino). Inserted via mongosh in test_database.
seed_data_creation: Demo data auto-seeds via ensure_demo_data() on first authenticated /properties or /contracts call (6 properties, 5 contracts).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use existing tokens above with Authorization: Bearer header or as session_token cookie. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_revant_api.py. The role switcher uses data-testid='role-admin' / 'role-inquilino' inside the topbar dropdown menu (need to click avatar/profile dropdown trigger first to expand). Contract viewer modal opens via 'Ver' (eye icon button) or 'Abrir' button on Contratos page; signature flow simulated client-side then POST /api/contracts/{id}/sign.
